# comfyui_subgraph_definition (Data Source)

Reads a single read-only editor-native subgraph definition from ComfyUI /global_subgraphs/{id}.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) SHA-derived subgraph identifier from comfyui_subgraph_catalog.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Raw editor-native JSON string returned inside the upstream data field.
- `definition_count` (Number) Number of definition subgraphs embedded in the JSON payload.
- `definition_ids` (List of String) Definition identifiers embedded in definitions.subgraphs.
- `group_count` (Number) Number of top-level editor groups in the subgraph JSON.
- `info_json` (String) Raw JSON serialization of the entry info object.
- `name` (String) Subgraph display name.
- `node_count` (Number) Number of top-level editor nodes in the subgraph JSON.
- `node_pack` (String) Node pack metadata reported inside info.node_pack.
- `normalized_json` (String) Normalized editor-native JSON parsed through the faithful workspace model.
- `source` (String) Catalog source reported by ComfyUI.
- `workspace_id` (String) Top-level workspace identifier, when present.
- `workspace_name` (String) Top-level workspace name, when present.
